程序包 com.qq.recruitment.dao

类 JsonFileDAO

java.lang.Object
com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO
public class JsonFileDAO extends Object
Monolithic data access object that reads and writes all entity types from flat JSON files. Each instance creates a fresh copy, so every call re-reads from disk with no caching. Thread safety is handled by callers via synchronized blocks.
